title: FLOSS Weekly 506: Invoice Ninja
summary:
Hillel Coren used to work at M5 Networks (a telecommunication startup in NY), which was eventually bought by ShoreTel. Since then he co-founded Invoice Ninja, an open-source platform to invoice, track payments, expenses, and time billable tasks for clients.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
